listTriggerPrompts.sPrompt: Expose a new HTTP endpoint that reports how long each container has been running.

I want a REST API route group for managing user bookmarks of workflow steps.

Add a loader so generated tests can check scalars stored in TOML data files.
Add a button to the dashboard that collapses all workflow steps at once.
Fix the typo in the QuickStart documentation.
Why does the container badge stay grey after I connect?
Refactor the step-name slug helper to handle hyphenated names.
Write a unit test for the existing CSV loader's error handling.
Change the JSON response shape of an existing pipeline status endpoint.
